name: Sony Group Corporation (Sony Mobile Communications)
description: Sony Group Corporation is a leading global conglomerate headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. The company operates a diverse portfolio of businesses, including electronics, video games, music, and motion pictures. Through its Entertainment, Technology & Services segment, which encompasses mobile communications, imaging products, and home entertainment, Sony remains a pioneer in consumer technology. Additionally, the group maintains a strong presence in imaging and sensing solutions, as well as financial services. Sony is widely recognized for its commitment to innovation, creativity, and delivering high-quality entertainment experiences to consumers worldwide.
